subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my Hope and my Beloved, my Refuge! These assured souls, whose names through Thine inspiration were written in this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و رجائی و مهربی و ملاذی ان هولاء الموقنین المدون اسمائهم بالهام منک فی هذه
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @prayer for children and youth, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
